name: Expatriate Foreign Death Tax Credit

eligibility.description: Applies to 'covered expatriates' subject to section 877(b) whose foreign assets are pulled into the U.S. estate tax net.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides a credit against U.S. estate tax for foreign death taxes paid on property included in the U.S. estate solely due to expatriation rules.
